FirewallRule.description: Array of rules. Rules are limited to 50 entries per Firewall and 500 effective rules.

direction.description: Traffic direction in which the rule should be applied to.

sourceIps.description: List of permitted IPv4/IPv6 addresses for incoming traffic.

destinationIps.description: List of permitted IPv4/IPv6 addresses for outgoing traffic.

protocol.description: Network protocol to apply the rule for.

port.description: Port or port range to apply the rule for.

FirewallApplyToServer.description: Server the Firewall is applied to. Only set for type `server`, otherwise `null`.

FirewallApplyToLabelSelector.description: Label Selector the Firewall is applied to. Only set for type `label_selector`, otherwise `null`.

FirewallApplyTo.description: Resources to apply the Firewall to. Resources added directly are taking precedence over those added via a Label Selector.

server.description: Server the Firewall is applied to.

labelSelector.description: Label Selector the Firewall is applied to.

FirewallRuleDirection.description: Traffic direction in which the rule should be applied to. Use `source_ips` for direction `in` and `destination_ips` for direction `out` to specify IPs.

FirewallRuleProtocol.description: Network protocol to apply the rule for.

applyTo.description: Resources to apply the Firewall to.
